attr.title: Super Galaxy Squadron EX Turbo
attr.desc: Super Galaxy Squadron is a fast-paced vertical shooter designed for human beings as well as SHMUP veterans. Featuring multiple game modes, a challenging but merciful difficulty curve, forgiving health system, and SEVENTEEN playable ships.
attr.inst:
Purchase the game on Steam and copy Super Galaxy Squadron EX.exe or Super Galaxy Squadron.exe into assets folder. For users outside of Windows, use this Steam console command to download the correct version: download_depot 345860 345861 8087376341108724441
Note: this is a 32bit game.
attr.inst_md:
Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/345860/Super_Galaxy_Squadron_EX_Turbo/) and copy `Super Galaxy Squadron EX.exe` or `Super Galaxy Squadron.exe`  into `assets` folder. For users outside of Windows, use this [Steam console](steam://open/console) command to download the correct version: `download_depot 345860 345861 8087376341108724441`
Note: this is a 32bit game.
